case_title: CESAR MADRILLEJOS VS. CALIFORNIA PARKING COMPANY

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADRILLEJOS, CESAR
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-04-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADRILLEJOS, CESAR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
